user.title: Connect OpenAI Codex Usage
user.description:
Enter Codex credentials from another machine where `codex login --device-auth` was completed.

Required: Access Token
Optional: Account ID and Refresh Token

Copy from ~/.codex/auth.json under tokens.access_token, tokens.account_id, and tokens.refresh_token.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect OpenAI Codex Usage
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are invalid or expired. Enter fresh credentials from a machine where Codex is logged in.

error.invalid_access_token: Credential validation failed. Ensure token is fresh and copied correctly.

abort.already_configured: OpenAI Codex Usage is already configured
